code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if in_num
          if neg
            sum = sum - cur
          else
            sum = sum + cur
          end
          count = count + 1
          in_num = false
          cur = 0
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        neg = true
        in_num = true
      else if b == 43 and not in_num
        in_num = true
      else
        in_num = true
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if neg
      sum = sum - cur
    else
      sum = sum + cur
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  println("avg=#{avg}")
end
